name: rootflowai-image
description: Generate and edit images through the RootFlowAI images API and save them locally.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and edit images through RootFlowAI
interface.longDescription: Create and edit images with the RootFlowAI-compatible images API, using bundled workflows that handle auth, request formatting, response parsing, and saving files to disk.
defaultPrompt: Generate an image through RootFlowAI with my prompt and save it locally.
Edit an existing portrait through RootFlowAI and write the output files to my workspace.
Create or revise a RootFlowAI image and keep the raw API response for debugging.
